name: Wine Hunt: Aim Fidelity
short_description: Wine Hunt: Aim Fidelity is a thrilling blend of aiming and memory training, infused with elements of dodgeball. Test your skills in scenarios like survival and dominate the leaderboards!
detailed_description:
Put your accuracy, memory and timing to the test in various satisfying scenarios with a dodgeball-like gameplay. Amazing precision is important, but be smart and recognize target patterns to have an easier time.

As you progress further, your adaptability becomes crucial, requiring constant adjustments in positioning and skillful evasive maneuvers to evade incoming threats, all while maintaining focus on precise aiming and figuring out target patterns.

The maps feature intelligent machines called Target Launchers that spawn targets in different patterns (angle, speed, etc.) over the course of a level. These Target Launchers also serve as laser-emitting loudspeakers, providing you with helpful cues for activation, upcoming bonus targets, and more.

Wine Hunt is an easy-to-understand game, yet offers a rewarding challenge for those seeking mastery.

Advantages and features


  • Satisfying destruction and visual effects, even on low graphic settings
  • High skill ceiling offers ample room for long-term skill growth
  • Different game modes such as Click/Timing, Time Attack, Laser Tracking and Survival
  • Good performance, low latency, and improved responsiveness with NVIDIA Reflex
  • Ambiances range from exuberant and cherful to gloomy, mysterious, dark and eerie
  • Difficulty levels from low up to exceptional! - 110 % Hardcore

WARNING: Have a good strong cup of coffee before trying this game, and keep telephone numbers of emergency services within reach. And, above all, stay sober!
